en.extract:
Rouget's rail (Rougetius rougetii) is a species of bird in the family Rallidae. It is the only member of the genus Rougetius. It is found in Eritrea and Ethiopia.


Habitat
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland, subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland, rivers, swamps, freshwater marshes, pastureland, rural gardens, and urban areas.
It is threatened by habitat loss.


Gallery


References

'''Rouget's rail''' ('''''Rougetius rougetii''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Rallidae]]. It is the [[Monotypic taxon|only member]] of the [[genus]] '''''Rougetius'''''. It is found in [[Eritrea]] and [[Ethiopia]].

==Habitat==
Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical]] or tropical high-altitude [[shrubland]], subtropical or [[tropical]] high-altitude [[grassland]], [[river]]s, [[swamp]]s, freshwater [[marsh]]es, [[pastureland]], rural [[garden]]s, and [[urban area]]s.
It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].

==Gallery==

File:Rouget's Rail2.jpg|Rouget's rail in Debre Birhan, Ethiopia
File:Rail1.jpg|Rouget's rail in Debre Birhan, Ethiopia

zh.extract:
鲁氏秧鸡（台湾作高地秧雞，学名：Rougetius rougetii），是鹤形目秧鸡科的一种鸟类。


特征
鲁氏秧鸡体重约193.39克，翼长约12.84厘米，喙宽度约4.1毫米，喙厚度约6.6毫米，嘴峰长约34.1毫米，跗蹠长约49.2毫米，尾长约47.6毫米。鲁氏秧鸡是留鸟，栖息在湖泊、沼泽等湿地环境，它们是杂食性动物。它们分布在厄立特里亚和埃塞俄比亚的高原地区。
